title: New Hampshire Chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE in NH) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the New Hampshire Chapter (NADE in NH) of the Northeast Region of the National Association of Disability Examiners. Includes a preamble and covers chapter name, geographic boundaries/purpose, membership, limitations, the Board of Directors, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary-Treasurer), the annual meeting (first Tuesday in February), board duties and meetings, finances and fiscal year (7/1–6/30), duties of officers, standing committees (Membership, Publications, Program, Constitution and By-laws, Educational-Training), chapter meetings, amendments, and rules of order.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — New Hampshire Chapter (NADE in NH)
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the New Hampshire Chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'New-Hampshire-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived (the constitution's Article numbering is slightly inconsistent and some words are run together, e.g. 'NADE in NHnewsletter', as conversion artifacts). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
